seo.title: Colleagues Support | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Health, wellbeing, finance, and professional development resources for Vigil Care Staffing colleagues. Links to support across every area of working life.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Practical support for Vigil Care Staffing colleagues across health, wellbeing, finances and professional development.
fields.heading: Colleague Support
fields.cta_label: Speak to the Vigil Care Staffing Team
fields.image_alt: Care worker taking a supported break between shifts

fields.body: Caring for others is rewarding, but it can also be demanding. At Vigil Care Staffing we want our colleagues to feel supported both on and off shift. The categories below point you towards trusted help across your health, wellbeing, finances and personal development. If you are ever unsure where to turn, our team can help you find the right support.
fields.heading: Support across every area of working life

items.body: Guidance on staying physically well, managing long hours and looking after your body while working in care.
items.title: Health and Well-being

items.body: Confidential support for stress, low mood and the emotional demands of care work, so you never have to cope alone.
items.title: Mental Well-being

items.body: Signposting to budgeting help, benefits advice and money guidance to help you feel more secure day to day.
items.title: Finance

items.body: Access to learning resources that build reading, writing and number skills to support your confidence and career.
items.title: Literacy and Numeracy

items.body: Clear information on your employment, working rights and how to raise questions about your assignments.
items.title: HR

items.body: Help with the apps and digital tools you use to view rotas, submit timesheets and stay in touch.
items.title: Information Technology

items.body: Signposting to childcare guidance and support so you can balance family life with your care assignments.
items.title: Childcare

items.body: Details of groups and communities where care workers share experiences and encourage one another.
items.title: Support Groups

items.a: These resources are for colleagues working with Vigil Care Staffing across Greater London. They are here to support you throughout your time with us.
items.q: Who can use these support resources?

items.a: Yes. Wellbeing and personal support is treated in confidence, and using it will never affect the assignments you are offered.
If none of the categories fit your situation, our team can help you find the right support or point you to a suitable service.
items.q: What if I cannot find the help I need?

fields.sub: Our team is here to point you in the right direction.
fields.heading: Need help finding the right support?
fields.cta_label: Speak to the Vigil Care Staffing Team

fields.heading: Get in touch with Vigil Care Staffing
